summary: A Go-based CLI tool for running infrastructure and service assertions, featuring Goss migration, monorepo discovery, and multi-protocol support.
concerns: Heavy reliance on AI-generated commits suggests possible instability or rapid prototyping phase
Goss migration implies technical debt from a legacy tool
Broad protocol support (WebSocket, gRPC, Kubernetes) may lead to scope creep
suggestions: Focus on stabilizing the core assertion runner before expanding protocol support
Document the Goss migration path and deprecation timeline
Establish integration tests for Kubernetes and plugin workflows
